sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32793" key="e)kpuhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκπῡ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n32793.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bringing to suppuration,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg012.perseus-grc1:5:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
